flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Puget Sound fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 1.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Puget Sound rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.7k → $62.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Puget Sound rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.7k → $62.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 8 pp at University of Puget Sound vs the 2018–2022 baseline (67.9% vs 75.8%).
